page_metadata.biotools__summary: Web based tool that takes a set of sequences (aligned or unaligned) and calculates a consensus sequence and the conservation rates for the sequence alignment, producing an easy to interpret visualization as output. One can also compare and visualize a set of consensus sequences generated from several sequence sets.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Web based tool that takes a set of sequences (aligned or unaligned) and calculates a consensus sequence and the conservation rates for the sequence alignment, producing an easy to interpret visualization as output. One can also compare and visualize a set of consensus sequences generated from several sequence sets.
